title: matelea tuerckheimii
intro: Matelea tuerckheimii, also known as the "Queen of the Night," is a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family, native to Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Matelea tuerckheimii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Matelea tuerckheimii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various health conditions, including fever, respiratory issues, and skin problems.
